title: Sameer
desc: After Sameer, a student, is wrongly arrested as a suspect in a series of bomb blasts, the police start using him in order to get to the real culprit.

title: Achanak
desc: A collection of terrifying short stories that focus on people experiencing paranormal events and coming across supernatural elements and horrifying ghostly entities

title: Agent Raghav
desc: Agent Raghav is a gifted detective who can sense the nature of the crime by simply taking a look at the victim and deducing the clues mentally. He uses this gift to track the most deadly criminals.

title: Paharganj
desc: In Paharganj, Delhi, a woman looks for her lost love and a man deals with his brother's death. Their world is further rocked by a politically motivated murder and a gang war.

desc: Human rights workers run into obstacles when they investigate killings in India.
